scoring_context: dynasty superflex TE-premium (Justin Boone Yahoo trade value charts — 2QB QB column, TE-Prem TE column)
notes: Justin Boone's monthly Yahoo dynasty trade value charts (QB/RB/WR/TE) combined into one cross-positional rank. Fetched by scripts/fetch_yahoo_boone.py, which follows Yahoo's 308 redirects from prior-month URLs to the newest article in each series. 2QB column used for QBs and TE Prem. column used for TEs — this is our Superflex + TEP league source.
